name: shadcn-registry-mcp
description: Install and manage shadcn/ui components via AI agents — no terminal required
long_description: shadcn-registry-mcp gives your AI direct access to the official shadcn/ui component registry. It installs components, resolves the full dependency tree, writes files, merges CSS variables, and runs your package manager — all from a conversation. Supports Next.js App Router, Next.js Pages Router, Vite, and any shadcn-initialized project. Security-hardened: network egress locked to ui.shadcn.com, path traversal prevention, no shell injection.

tools.name: detect_project
tools.description: Detect project framework, package manager, and shadcn configuration

tools.name: list_components
tools.description: List all available shadcn/ui components; filter by category

tools.name: list_groups
tools.description: List predefined component groups for bulk installation

tools.name: search_components
tools.description: Search components by name or keyword, ranked by relevance

tools.name: get_component_info
tools.description: Get component details: files, dependencies, CSS vars, and install status

tools.name: add_component
tools.description: Install components with full dependency resolution; supports dryRun and group installs

tools.name: remove_component
tools.description: Remove installed components by deleting their files

tools.name: list_installed
tools.description: See which shadcn components are currently installed in your project
